name.description: Plugin leaf name (kebab-case, e.g. payments). Slashes add sub-namespaces under the directory.

directory.description: Workspace-relative parent directory. Default: plugins. Use e.g. 'plugins/team-a' to nest under a namespace.

pluginName.description: Explicit plugin + marketplace name. Defaults to <namePrefix><path-based-name>.

description.description: Short description for plugin.json and README.
